title: Notices of Changes to the Prescription Drug List - Canada.ca
content:
## Notices of Changes to the Prescription Drug List
Recent notices of amendments and consultations on changes to the Prescription Drug List are found below.
Please note that consultation documents are removed from the list below once the associated notice of intent to amend has been posted. These consultation notices, and past notices not listed on this page, are available upon request. Please contact drug.prescription.status-statut.dordonnance.des.drogues@hc-sc.gc.ca .
